attributes.name: description
attributes.content: What happens kitsoki inbox sync --github against a busy repo intermittently comes back with an empty inbox even when there are open issues that mention the agent. It's not every run — maybe one in five — and there's no error printed, so ...

childNodes.textContent: against a busy repo intermittently comes back with an
empty inbox even when there are open issues that mention the agent. It's not every
run — maybe one in five — and there's no error printed, so it just looks like
Have at least one open issue and one open PR that mention
a handful of times in a row.
Every so often the result is empty, with exit code 0 and no warning.
The sync should return the full set of mentions, or fail loudly. Silently
dropping everything is the worst case — we skip real work and don't know it.
I suspect the PR-search half of the query is timing out and the error is being
swallowed, so the whole sync short-circuits to empty.

attributes.style: --rz-bg: rgb(13, 17, 23); --rz-color: rgb(240, 246, 252); --rz-source-radius: 10px; border-radius: 14px; top: 82px; left: 88px; width: 1104px; height: 736px;

payload.title: Read the bug report
payload.sourceText: Description bsacrobatix opened Last edited by bsacrobatix Owner What happens kitsoki inbox sync --github against a busy repo intermittently comes back with an empty inbox even when there are open issues that mention the agent. It's not every run — maybe one in five — and there's no error printed, so it just looks like there's nothing to do. Steps to reproduce Have at least one open issue and one open PR that mention @kitsoki. Run kitsoki inbox sync --github a handful of times in a row. Every so often the result is empty, with exit code 0 and no warning. Expected The sync should return the full set of mentions, or fail loudly. Silently dropping everything is the worst case — we skip real work and don't know it. Hunch I suspect the PR-search half of the query is timing out and the error is being swallowed, so the whole sync short-circuits to empty.

styleSignature.fontFamily: "Mona Sans VF", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"

node.textContent: The opening GitHub comment stays intact: avatar, username, metadata, and full issue body travel together.
